Tenth house- the longevity of functioning of the government.

Many ask one simple question how long will the government

The easiest method to be used is that of jamini ayurdaya.
 Longevity calculation in astrology -

Wednesday, 21 April , 2004, 17:02
“How long will I live?” That is one question people love to ask an astrologer, but hate
get the correct reply. Of course, death or timing of death can be predicted through
astrology and there are various techniques by which it can be done.
The longevity is divided into four important phases.
1.
